mapper.sql: pr.pres_id, pr.pres_no, pr.reg_id, pr.patient_id, pr.doctor_id, pr.status, pr.create_time, pr.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT , p.patient_name, p.patient_no, du.real_name AS doctor_name FROM prescription pr LEFT JOIN patient p ON pr.patient_id = p.patient_id LEFT JOIN sys_user du ON pr.doctor_id = du.user_id WHERE pr.pres_id = #{presId}

SELECT , p.patient_name, p.patient_no, du.real_name AS doctor_name FROM prescription pr LEFT JOIN patient p ON pr.patient_id = p.patient_id LEFT JOIN sys_user du ON pr.doctor_id = du.user_id WHERE pr.reg_id = #{regId} ORDER BY pr.pres_id

SELECT , p.patient_name, p.patient_no, du.real_name AS doctor_name FROM prescription pr LEFT JOIN patient p ON pr.patient_id = p.patient_id LEFT JOIN sys_user du ON pr.doctor_id = du.user_id WHERE pr.patient_id = #{patientId} AND pr.status = #{status} ORDER BY pr.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO prescription (pres_no, reg_id, patient_id, doctor_id, status) VALUES (#{presNo}, #{regId}, #{patientId}, #{doctorId}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE prescription SET status = #{status} WHERE pres_id = #{presId}
